title: Soudal 750ml Champagne Gap Filler Expanding Foam Handheld Spray with Nozzle & Gloves (3)
features: Ideal for filling and insulating holes, cavities, gaps and joints in most construction applications.
Excellent adhesion to most common building substrates
An ideal solution for filling gaps, cracks and holes in stone, wood, bricks and most common building materials
This expandable PU foam gap filling has excellent acoustic and thermal insulation properties.
description: Moisture curing, polyurethane foam for general purpose gap filling. Adheres to most common building materials, water, heat and ageing resistant. Excellent thermal and acoustic insulation values. Can be cut, sanded, plastered and painted once fully cured. Not UV resistant, cover with sealant, paint or plaster once cured. This expanding foam from Soudal is specifically designed to fill small gaps and cracks and is suitable for indoor and outdoor use. It's easy to store when not in use and expands to 30x can volume/750ml. If you're using it on renovation projects, it's sandable and paintable, making it perfect for a smooth, professional finish once dry. Comes with hand nozzle and gloves. Features & Benefits: This expandable PU foam gap filling has excellent acoustic and thermal insulation properties. Can be easily sanded, painted and plastered. Expands up to 30 times its original volume. An ideal solution for filling gaps and holes in stone, wood, brick in most common building materials. Excellent adhesion to most common building substrates. The cap on the can screws tightly into the port on the top of the flue. Features General purpose gap filling. High thermal and acoustic insulation High gap filling yield. Applications: Ideal for filling and insulating holes, cavities, gaps and joints in most building applications. Adheres to most building materials. Can also be used around windows and door frames. Insulation of pipes etc.
